latest.title: The Sermon on the Mount | Lecture One (Official) | Peterson Academy
latest.desc: In The Sermon on the Mount, an eight-hour course, Dr. Jordan B. Peterson explores the profound wisdom and symbolism embedded in this foundational biblical text, highlighting the transformative power of living by Christ-like principles. He offers a deep dive into key passages, such as the Beatitudes
